name: Modoki Betamon
description: An Amphibian Digimon just like Betamon . Although it looks identical to Betamon, it is a rare species with a very small population. With its calm personality, it inhabits quiet swampland, and skillfully controls water currents. Its Special Moves are unleashing a tiny waterspout ( Aqua Tower ), and generating a shock wave from the crest on its head ( Blade Fin ).
